title: Accurate spear texture
description: Makes the spear GUI icon match it's in-hand appearance for a more consistent look.
body: ![Old-New texture comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/481a0e4de9d62a4b08cc624131ffe9420e223f22.png)Makes the spear GUI icon look more similar to how it appears in the player’s hand. This change helps the icon better match the actual spear, so it looks more consistent in the game and is easier to recognize.
